text.title: Docker Image Optimization Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules including a `skip-this-methodology` rule. Each pairs a binary check with sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Optimization MUST use a multi-stage Dockerfile; single-stage rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Production base MUST be the smallest viable image for the language (distroless, alpine, slim) with justified choice.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Dependency install layers MUST use `--mount=type=cache` for pip / npm / go-mod / apt; reinstalling on every layer rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: .dockerignore MUST exclude `.git`, `node_modules`, `__pycache__`, `tests/`, language-specific build outputs that are not needed.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Optimization plan MUST record before/after target sizes and CI time budget; aspirational only-text rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Skip when image already within SLO OR fully managed by vendor.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.
